zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Beaumetz於1232年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯時，她的父親Gilles de Beaumetz32歲，母親Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes18歲。她與Jean de Raineval I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在法國皮卡迪索姆麥利-萊聶瓦爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Beaumetz于1232年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯时，她的父亲Gilles de Beaumetz32岁，母亲Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes18岁。她与Jean de Raineval I结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在法国皮卡迪索姆麥利-萊聶瓦爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Beaumetz was born in 1232, in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Gilles de Beaumetz, was 32 and her mother, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, was 18. She married Jean de Raineval I. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1298, in Mailly-Raineval, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Beaumetz est née en 1232, à Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Gilles de Beaumetz, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Raineval I. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Mailly-Raineval, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Beaumetz 1232 in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilles de Beaumetz 32 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes 18. Sie hat Jean de Raineval I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Mailly-Raineval, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Beaumetz è nata il nel 1232 nel Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Gilles de Beaumetz, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Raineval I. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1298, nel Mailly-Raineval, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumetzが1232年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスビーウメトズ-ルeス-ロジェズで生まれた時，父Gilles de Beaumetzは32歳，母Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmesは18歳であった。Jean de Raineval Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にフランスピカーディソンメメイリ-レアイネヴァルで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumetz(이)가 1232년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 보멧즈-e스-로그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilles de Beaumetz(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Jean de Raineval I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 프랑스 피카디 솜 메이리-레이네발에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Beaumetz nasceu em 1232, em Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Gilles de Beaumetz, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Raineval I. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Mailly-Raineval, Somme, Picardie, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Beaumetz родилась в 1232 г. в местности бомец-лeс-логесь, аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilles de Beaumetz было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Raineval I. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности меилли-реаиневаль, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Beaumetz nació en 1232, en Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Gilles de Beaumetz, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Jean de Raineval I. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1298, en Mailly-Raineval, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
